member.name: P:HexTools.IHexCompress.Name
member.summary: Known name, such as: LZ77, RLE, etc.

member.name: M:HexTools.IHexCompress.Compress(System.Byte[],HexTools.IHexCompressionInformation@,HexTools.IHexCompressionOptions)
member.summary: Compression algorithm.

member.name: M:HexTools.IHexCompress.Decompress(System.IO.Stream,HexTools.IHexDecompressionInformation@,HexTools.IHexDecompressionOptions)
member.summary: Decompression algorithm.

member.name: T:HexTools.UInt24
member.summary: Represents a 3-byte, 24-bit unsigned integer.

remarks.para: This class behaves like most other intrinsic unsigned integers but allows a 3-byte, 24-bit integer implementation that is often found in many digital-signal processing arenas and different kinds of protocol parsing. An unsigned 24-bit integer is typically used to save storage space on disk where its value range of 0 to 16777215 is sufficient, but the unsigned Int16 value range of 0 to 65535 is too small.

This structure uses an UInt32 internally for storage and most other common expected integer functionality, so using a 24-bit integer will not save memory. However, if the 24-bit unsigned integer range (0 to 16777215) suits your data needs you can save disk space by only storing the three bytes that this integer actually consumes. You can do this by calling the UInt24.GetBytes function to return a three byte binary array that can be serialized to the desired destination and then calling the UInt24.GetValue function to restore the UInt24 value from those three bytes.

All the standard operators for the UInt24 have been fully defined for use with both UInt24 and UInt32 unsigned integers; you should find that without the exception UInt24 can be compared and numerically calculated with an UInt24 or UInt32. Necessary casting should be minimal and typical use should be very simple - just as if you are using any other native unsigned integer.

member.name: F:HexTools.UInt24.BitMask
member.summary: High byte bit-mask used when a 24-bit integer is stored within a 32-bit integer. This field is constant.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.#ctor(HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Creates 24-bit unsigned integer from an existing 24-bit unsigned integer.
member.param: A to create the new value from.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.#ctor(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Creates 24-bit unsigned integer from a 32-bit unsigned integer.
member.param: 32-bit unsigned integer to use as new 24-bit unsigned integer value.
member.exception: Source values over 24-bit max range will cause an overflow exception.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates 24-bit unsigned integer from three bytes at a specified position in a byte array.

remarks.para: You can use this constructor in-lieu of a System.BitConverter.ToUInt24 function.
Bytes endian order assumed to match that of currently executing process architecture (little-endian on Intel platforms).

member.exception: cannot be null.
is greater than length.
length from is too small to represent a .

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.GetBytes
member.summary: Returns the UInt24 value as an array of three bytes.
member.returns: An array of bytes with length 3.

remarks.para: You can use this function in-lieu of a System.BitConverter.GetBytes function.
Bytes will be returned in endian order of currently executing process architecture (little-endian on Intel platforms).

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.CompareTo(System.Object)
member.summary: Compares this instance to a specified object and returns an indication of their relative values.
member.param: An object to compare, or null.
member.returns: A signed number indicating the relative values of this instance and value. Returns less than zero if this instance is less than value, zero if this instance is equal to value, or greater than zero if this instance is greater than value.
member.exception: value is not an UInt32 or UInt24.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.CompareTo(HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Compares this instance to a specified 24-bit unsigned integer and returns an indication of their relative values.
member.returns: A signed number indicating the relative values of this instance and value. Returns less than zero if this instance is less than value, zero if this instance is equal to value, or greater than zero if this instance is greater than value.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.CompareTo(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Compares this instance to a specified 32-bit unsigned integer and returns an indication of their relative values.
member.returns: A signed number indicating the relative values of this instance and value. Returns less than zero if this instance is less than value, zero if this instance is equal to value, or greater than zero if this instance is greater than value.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns a value indicating whether this instance is equal to a specified object.
member.param: An object to compare, or null.
member.returns: True if obj is an instance of UInt32 or UInt24 and equals the value of this instance; otherwise, False.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.Equals(HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns a value indicating whether this instance is equal to a specified UInt24 value.
member.param: An UInt24 value to compare to this instance.
member.returns: True if obj has the same value as this instance; otherwise, False.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.Equals(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns a value indicating whether this instance is equal to a specified uint value.
member.param: An UInt32 value to compare to this instance.
member.returns: True if obj has the same value as this instance; otherwise, False.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns the hash code for this instance.
member.returns: A 32-bit unsigned integer hash code.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.ToString
member.summary: Converts the numeric value of this instance to its equivalent string representation.
member.returns: The string representation of the value of this instance, consisting of a minus sign if the value is negative, and a sequence of digits ranging from 0 to 9 with no leading zeroes.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.ToString(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the numeric value of this instance to its equivalent string representation, using the specified format.
member.returns: The string representation of the value of this instance as specified by format.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.ToString(System.IFormatProvider)
member.summary: Converts the numeric value of this instance to its equivalent string representation using the specified culture-specific format information.
member.param: A that supplies culture-specific formatting information.
member.returns: The string representation of the value of this instance as specified by provider.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.ToString(System.String,System.IFormatProvider)
member.summary: Converts the numeric value of this instance to its equivalent string representation using the specified format and culture-specific format information.
member.param: A that supplies culture-specific formatting information.
member.returns: The string representation of the value of this instance as specified by format and provider.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the string representation of a number to its 24-bit unsigned integer equivalent.
member.param: A string containing a number to convert.
member.returns: A 24-bit unsigned integer equivalent to the number contained in s.
member.exception: s is null.
s represents a number less than UInt24.MinValue or greater than UInt24.MaxValue.
s is not in the correct format.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.Parse(System.String,System.Globalization.NumberStyles)
member.summary: Converts the string representation of a number in a specified style to its 24-bit unsigned integer equivalent.
member.param: A string containing a number to convert.
A bitwise combination of System.Globalization.NumberStyles values that indicates the permitted format of s. A typical value to specify is System.Globalization.NumberStyles.Integer.
member.returns: A 24-bit unsigned integer equivalent to the number contained in s.
member.exception: style is not a System.Globalization.NumberStyles value. -or- style is not a combination of System.Globalization.NumberStyles.AllowHexSpecifier and System.Globalization.NumberStyles.HexNumber values.
s is null.
s represents a number less than UInt24.MinValue or greater than UInt24.MaxValue.
s is not in a format compliant with style.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.Parse(System.String,System.IFormatProvider)
member.summary: Converts the string representation of a number in a specified culture-specific format to its 24-bit unsigned integer equivalent.
member.param: A string containing a number to convert.
A that supplies culture-specific formatting information about s.
member.returns: A 24-bit unsigned integer equivalent to the number contained in s.
member.exception: s is null.
s represents a number less than UInt24.MinValue or greater than UInt24.MaxValue.
s is not in the correct format.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.Parse(System.String,System.Globalization.NumberStyles,System.IFormatProvider)
member.summary: Converts the string representation of a number in a specified style and culture-specific format to its 24-bit unsigned integer equivalent.
member.param: A string containing a number to convert.
A bitwise combination of System.Globalization.NumberStyles values that indicates the permitted format of s. A typical value to specify is System.Globalization.NumberStyles.Integer.
A that supplies culture-specific formatting information about s.
member.returns: A 24-bit unsigned integer equivalent to the number contained in s.
member.exception: style is not a System.Globalization.NumberStyles value. -or- style is not a combination of System.Globalization.NumberStyles.AllowHexSpecifier and System.Globalization.NumberStyles.HexNumber values.
s is null.
s represents a number less than UInt24.MinValue or greater than UInt24.MaxValue.
s is not in a format compliant with style.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.TryParse(System.String,HexTools.UInt24@)
member.summary: Converts the string representation of a number to its 24-bit unsigned integer equivalent. A return value indicates whether the conversion succeeded or failed.
member.param: A string containing a number to convert.

When this method returns, contains the 24-bit unsigned integer value equivalent to the number contained in s, if the conversion succeeded, or zero if the conversion failed. The conversion fails if the s parameter is null, is not of the correct format, or represents a number less than UInt24.MinValue or greater than UInt24.MaxValue. This parameter is passed uninitialized.
member.returns: true if s was converted successfully; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.TryParse(System.String,System.Globalization.NumberStyles,System.IFormatProvider,HexTools.UInt24@)
member.summary: Converts the string representation of a number in a specified style and culture-specific format to its 24-bit unsigned integer equivalent. A return value indicates whether the conversion succeeded or failed.
member.param: A string containing a number to convert.
A bitwise combination of System.Globalization.NumberStyles values that indicates the permitted format of s. A typical value to specify is System.Globalization.NumberStyles.Integer.

When this method returns, contains the 24-bit unsigned integer value equivalent to the number contained in s, if the conversion succeeded, or zero if the conversion failed. The conversion fails if the s parameter is null, is not in a format compliant with style, or represents a number less than UInt24.MinValue or greater than UInt24.MaxValue. This parameter is passed uninitialized.
A object that supplies culture-specific formatting information about s.
member.returns: true if s was converted successfully; otherwise, false.
member.exception: style is not a System.Globalization.NumberStyles value. -or- style is not a combination of System.Globalization.NumberStyles.AllowHexSpecifier and System.Globalization.NumberStyles.HexNumber values.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.GetTypeCode
member.summary: Returns the System.TypeCode for value type System.UInt32 (there is no defined type code for an UInt24).
member.returns: The enumerated constant, System.TypeCode.UInt32.
member.remarks: There is no defined UInt24 type code and since an UInt24 will easily fit inside an UInt32, the UInt32 type code is returned.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Equality(HexTools.UInt24,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Compares the two values for equality.
member.returns: value representing the result.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Equality(System.UInt32,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Compares the two values for equality.
member.returns: value representing the result.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Equality(HexTools.UInt24,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Compares the two values for equality.
member.returns: value representing the result.

member.summary: Compares the two values for inequality.
member.returns: value representing the result.

member.summary: Compares the two values for inequality.
member.returns: value representing the result.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Inequality(HexTools.UInt24,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Compares the two values for inequality.
member.returns: value representing the result.

member.summary: Returns true if left value is less than right value.

member.summary: Returns true if left value is greater than or equal to right value.

member.summary: Returns true if left value is greater than or equal to right value.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_True(HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns true if value is greater than zero.
member.returns: value indicating whether the value is greater than zero.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_False(HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns true if value is equal to zero.
member.returns: value indicating whether the value is equal than zero.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_OnesComplement(HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns bitwise complement of value.
member.returns: value representing the complement of the input value.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_BitwiseAnd(HexTools.UInt24,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise AND of values.
member.returns: value representing the logical bitwise AND of the values.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_BitwiseAnd(System.UInt32,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise AND of values.
member.returns: value representing the logical bitwise AND of the values.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_BitwiseAnd(HexTools.UInt24,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise AND of values.
member.returns: value representing the logical bitwise AND of the values.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_BitwiseOr(HexTools.UInt24,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise OR of values.
member.returns: value representing the logical bitwise OR of the values.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_BitwiseOr(System.UInt32,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise OR of values.
member.returns: value representing the logical bitwise OR of the values.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_BitwiseOr(HexTools.UInt24,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise OR of values.
member.returns: value representing the logical bitwise OR of the values.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_ExclusiveOr(HexTools.UInt24,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise exclusive-OR of values.
member.returns: value representing the logical bitwise exclusive-OR of the values.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_ExclusiveOr(System.UInt32,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise exclusive-OR of values.
member.returns: value representing the logical bitwise exclusive-OR of the values.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_ExclusiveOr(HexTools.UInt24,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise exclusive-OR of values.
member.returns: value representing the logical bitwise exclusive-OR of the values.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_RightShift(HexTools.UInt24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns value after right shifts of first value by the number of bits specified by second value.
member.param: value indicating the number of bits to right shift by.
member.returns: value as result of right shift operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_LeftShift(HexTools.UInt24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns value after left shifts of first value by the number of bits specified by second value.
member.param: value indicating the number of bits to left shift by.
member.returns: value as result of left shift operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Modulus(HexTools.UInt24,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns computed remainder after dividing first value by the second.
member.returns: value as result of modulus operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Modulus(System.UInt32,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns computed remainder after dividing first value by the second.
member.returns: value as result of modulus operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Modulus(HexTools.UInt24,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns computed remainder after dividing first value by the second.
member.returns: value as result of modulus operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Addition(HexTools.UInt24,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns computed sum of values.
member.returns: value as result of addition operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Addition(System.UInt32,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns computed sum of values.
member.returns: value as result of addition operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Addition(HexTools.UInt24,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns computed sum of values.
member.returns: value as result of addition operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Subtraction(HexTools.UInt24,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns computed difference of values.
member.returns: value as result of subtraction operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Subtraction(System.UInt32,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns computed difference of values.
member.returns: value as result of subtraction operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Subtraction(HexTools.UInt24,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns computed difference of values.
member.returns: value as result of subtraction operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Increment(HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns incremented value.
member.returns: result of increment.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Decrement(HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns decremented value.
member.returns: result of decrement.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Multiply(HexTools.UInt24,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns computed product of values.
member.returns: value as result of multiplication operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Multiply(System.UInt32,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns computed product of values.
member.returns: value as result of multiplication operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Multiply(HexTools.UInt24,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns computed product of values.
member.returns: value as result of multiplication operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Division(HexTools.UInt24,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns computed division of values.
member.returns: value as result of division operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Division(System.UInt32,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns computed division of values.
member.returns: value as result of division operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Division(HexTools.UInt24,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns computed division of values.
member.returns: value as result of division operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Exponent(HexTools.UInt24,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns result of first value raised to power of second value.
member.returns: value as result of operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Exponent(System.Int32,HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns result of first value raised to power of second value.
member.returns: value as result of operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.op_Exponent(HexTools.UInt24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns result of first value raised to power of second value.
member.returns: value as result of operation.

member.name: F:HexTools.UInt24.MaxValue
member.summary: Represents the largest possible value of an Int24. This field is constant.

member.name: F:HexTools.UInt24.MinValue
member.summary: Represents the smallest possible value of an Int24. This field is constant.

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.GetBytes(HexTools.UInt24)
member.summary: Returns the specified UInt24 value as an array of three bytes.
member.param: UInt24 value to convert to bytes.
member.returns: An array of bytes with length 3.

remarks.para: You can use this function in-lieu of a System.BitConverter.GetBytes(UInt24) function.
Bytes will be returned in endian order of currently executing process architecture (little-endian on Intel platforms).

member.name: M:HexTools.UInt24.GetValue(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a 24-bit unsigned integer from three bytes at a specified position in a byte array.
member.returns: A 24-bit unsigned integer formed by three bytes beginning at startIndex.

remarks.para: You can use this function in-lieu of a System.BitConverter.ToUInt24 function.
Bytes endian order assumed to match that of currently executing process architecture (little-endian on Intel platforms).

member.exception: cannot be null.
is greater than length.
length from is too small to represent an .

member.name: T:HexTools.Int24
member.summary: Represents a 3-byte, 24-bit signed integer.

remarks.para: This class behaves like most other intrinsic signed integers but allows a 3-byte, 24-bit integer implementation that is often found in many digital-signal processing arenas and different kinds of protocol parsing. A signed 24-bit integer is typically used to save storage space on disk where its value range of -8388608 to 8388607 is sufficient, but the signed Int16 value range of -32768 to 32767 is too small.

This structure uses an Int32 internally for storage and most other common expected integer functionality, so using a 24-bit integer will not save memory. However, if the 24-bit signed integer range (-8388608 to 8388607) suits your data needs you can save disk space by only storing the three bytes that this integer actually consumes. You can do this by calling the Int24.GetBytes function to return a three byte binary array that can be serialized to the desired destination and then calling the Int24.GetValue function to restore the Int24 value from those three bytes.

All the standard operators for the Int24 have been fully defined for use with both Int24 and Int32 signed integers; you should find that without the exception Int24 can be compared and numerically calculated with an Int24 or Int32. Necessary casting should be minimal and typical use should be very simple - just as if you are using any other native signed integer.

member.name: F:HexTools.Int24.BitMask
member.summary: High byte bit-mask used when a 24-bit integer is stored within a 32-bit integer. This field is constant.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.#ctor(HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Creates 24-bit signed integer from an existing 24-bit signed integer.
member.param: 24-but signed integer to create new Int24 from.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates 24-bit signed integer from a 32-bit signed integer.
member.param: 32-bit signed integer to use as new 24-bit signed integer value.
member.exception: Source values outside 24-bit min/max range will cause an overflow exception.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates 24-bit signed integer from three bytes at a specified position in a byte array.

remarks.para: You can use this constructor in-lieu of a System.BitConverter.ToInt24 function.
Bytes endian order assumed to match that of currently executing process architecture (little-endian on Intel platforms).

member.exception: cannot be null.
is greater than length.
length from is too small to represent a .

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.GetBytes
member.summary: Returns the Int24 value as an array of three bytes.
member.returns: An array of bytes with length 3.

remarks.para: You can use this function in-lieu of a System.BitConverter.GetBytes function.
Bytes will be returned in endian order of currently executing process architecture (little-endian on Intel platforms).

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.CompareTo(System.Object)
member.summary: Compares this instance to a specified object and returns an indication of their relative values.
member.param: An object to compare, or null.
member.returns: A signed number indicating the relative values of this instance and value. Returns less than zero if this instance is less than value, zero if this instance is equal to value, or greater than zero if this instance is greater than value.
member.exception: value is not an Int32 or Int24.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.CompareTo(HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Compares this instance to a specified 24-bit signed integer and returns an indication of their relative values.
member.returns: A signed number indicating the relative values of this instance and value. Returns less than zero if this instance is less than value, zero if this instance is equal to value, or greater than zero if this instance is greater than value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.CompareTo(System.Int32)
member.summary: Compares this instance to a specified 32-bit signed integer and returns an indication of their relative values.
member.returns: A signed number indicating the relative values of this instance and value. Returns less than zero if this instance is less than value, zero if this instance is equal to value, or greater than zero if this instance is greater than value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns a value indicating whether this instance is equal to a specified object.
member.param: An object to compare, or null.
member.returns: True if obj is an instance of Int32 or Int24 and equals the value of this instance; otherwise, False.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.Equals(HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns a value indicating whether this instance is equal to a specified Int24 value.
member.param: An Int24 value to compare to this instance.
member.returns: True if obj has the same value as this instance; otherwise, False.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.Equals(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a value indicating whether this instance is equal to a specified Int32 value.
member.param: An Int32 value to compare to this instance.
member.returns: True if obj has the same value as this instance; otherwise, False.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns the hash code for this instance.
member.returns: A 32-bit signed integer hash code.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.ToString
member.summary: Converts the numeric value of this instance to its equivalent string representation.
member.returns: The string representation of the value of this instance, consisting of a minus sign if the value is negative, and a sequence of digits ranging from 0 to 9 with no leading zeroes.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.ToString(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the numeric value of this instance to its equivalent string representation, using the specified format.
member.returns: The string representation of the value of this instance as specified by format.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.ToString(System.IFormatProvider)
member.summary: Converts the numeric value of this instance to its equivalent string representation using the specified culture-specific format information.
member.param: A that supplies culture-specific formatting information.
member.returns: The string representation of the value of this instance as specified by provider.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.ToString(System.String,System.IFormatProvider)
member.summary: Converts the numeric value of this instance to its equivalent string representation using the specified format and culture-specific format information.
member.param: A that supplies culture-specific formatting information.
member.returns: The string representation of the value of this instance as specified by format and provider.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the string representation of a number to its 24-bit signed integer equivalent.
member.param: A string containing a number to convert.
member.returns: A 24-bit signed integer equivalent to the number contained in s.
member.exception: s is null.
s represents a number less than Int24.MinValue or greater than Int24.MaxValue.
s is not in the correct format.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.Parse(System.String,System.Globalization.NumberStyles)
member.summary: Converts the string representation of a number in a specified style to its 24-bit signed integer equivalent.
member.param: A string containing a number to convert.
A bitwise combination of System.Globalization.NumberStyles values that indicates the permitted format of s. A typical value to specify is System.Globalization.NumberStyles.Integer.
member.returns: A 24-bit signed integer equivalent to the number contained in s.
member.exception: style is not a System.Globalization.NumberStyles value. -or- style is not a combination of System.Globalization.NumberStyles.AllowHexSpecifier and System.Globalization.NumberStyles.HexNumber values.
s is null.
s represents a number less than Int24.MinValue or greater than Int24.MaxValue.
s is not in a format compliant with style.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.Parse(System.String,System.IFormatProvider)
member.summary: Converts the string representation of a number in a specified culture-specific format to its 24-bit signed integer equivalent.
member.param: A string containing a number to convert.
A that supplies culture-specific formatting information about s.
member.returns: A 24-bit signed integer equivalent to the number contained in s.
member.exception: s is null.
s represents a number less than Int24.MinValue or greater than Int24.MaxValue.
s is not in the correct format.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.Parse(System.String,System.Globalization.NumberStyles,System.IFormatProvider)
member.summary: Converts the string representation of a number in a specified style and culture-specific format to its 24-bit signed integer equivalent.
member.param: A string containing a number to convert.
A bitwise combination of System.Globalization.NumberStyles values that indicates the permitted format of s. A typical value to specify is System.Globalization.NumberStyles.Integer.
A that supplies culture-specific formatting information about s.
member.returns: A 24-bit signed integer equivalent to the number contained in s.
member.exception: style is not a System.Globalization.NumberStyles value. -or- style is not a combination of System.Globalization.NumberStyles.AllowHexSpecifier and System.Globalization.NumberStyles.HexNumber values.
s is null.
s represents a number less than Int24.MinValue or greater than Int24.MaxValue.
s is not in a format compliant with style.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.TryParse(System.String,HexTools.Int24@)
member.summary: Converts the string representation of a number to its 24-bit signed integer equivalent. A return value indicates whether the conversion succeeded or failed.
member.param: A string containing a number to convert.

When this method returns, contains the 24-bit signed integer value equivalent to the number contained in s, if the conversion succeeded, or zero if the conversion failed. The conversion fails if the s parameter is null, is not of the correct format, or represents a number less than Int24.MinValue or greater than Int24.MaxValue. This parameter is passed uninitialized.
member.returns: true if s was converted successfully; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.TryParse(System.String,System.Globalization.NumberStyles,System.IFormatProvider,HexTools.Int24@)
member.summary: Converts the string representation of a number in a specified style and culture-specific format to its 24-bit signed integer equivalent. A return value indicates whether the conversion succeeded or failed.
member.param: A string containing a number to convert.
A bitwise combination of System.Globalization.NumberStyles values that indicates the permitted format of s. A typical value to specify is System.Globalization.NumberStyles.Integer.

When this method returns, contains the 24-bit signed integer value equivalent to the number contained in s, if the conversion succeeded, or zero if the conversion failed. The conversion fails if the s parameter is null, is not in a format compliant with style, or represents a number less than Int24.MinValue or greater than Int24.MaxValue. This parameter is passed uninitialized.
A object that supplies culture-specific formatting information about s.
member.returns: true if s was converted successfully; otherwise, false.
member.exception: style is not a System.Globalization.NumberStyles value. -or- style is not a combination of System.Globalization.NumberStyles.AllowHexSpecifier and System.Globalization.NumberStyles.HexNumber values.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.GetTypeCode
member.summary: Returns the System.TypeCode for value type System.Int32 (there is no defined type code for an Int24).
member.returns: The enumerated constant, System.TypeCode.Int32.
member.remarks: There is no defined Int24 type code and since an Int24 will easily fit inside an Int32, the Int32 type code is returned.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Equality(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Compares the two values for equality.
member.returns: Boolean value indicating equality.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Equality(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Compares the two values for equality.
member.returns: Boolean value indicating equality.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Equality(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Compares the two values for equality.
member.returns: Boolean value indicating equality.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Inequality(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Compares the two values for inequality.
member.returns: Boolean indicating the result of the inequality.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Inequality(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Compares the two values for inequality.
member.returns: Boolean indicating the result of the inequality.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Inequality(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Compares the two values for inequality.
member.returns: Boolean indicating the result of the inequality.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_LessThan(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns true if left value is less than right value.
member.returns: Boolean indicating whether the left value was less than the right value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_LessThan(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns true if left value is less than right value.
member.returns: Boolean indicating whether the left value was less than the right value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_LessThan(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns true if left value is less than right value.
member.returns: Boolean indicating whether the left value was less than the right value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_LessThanOrEqual(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns true if left value is less or equal to than right value.
member.returns: Boolean indicating whether the left value was less than the right value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_LessThanOrEqual(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns true if left value is less or equal to than right value.
member.returns: Boolean indicating whether the left value was less than the right value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_LessThanOrEqual(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns true if left value is less or equal to than right value.
member.returns: Boolean indicating whether the left value was less than the right value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_GreaterThan(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns true if left value is greater than right value.
member.returns: Boolean indicating whether the left value was greater than the right value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_GreaterThan(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns true if left value is greater than right value.
member.returns: Boolean indicating whether the left value was greater than the right value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_GreaterThan(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns true if left value is greater than right value.
member.returns: Boolean indicating whether the left value was greater than the right value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_GreaterThanOrEqual(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns true if left value is greater than or equal to right value.
member.returns: Boolean indicating whether the left value was greater than or equal to the right value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_GreaterThanOrEqual(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns true if left value is greater than or equal to right value.
member.returns: Boolean indicating whether the left value was greater than or equal to the right value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_GreaterThanOrEqual(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns true if left value is greater than or equal to right value.
member.returns: Boolean indicating whether the left value was greater than or equal to the right value.

member.summary: Explicitly converts value to an .

member.summary: Implicitly converts value to an .

member.summary: Implicitly converts value to an .

member.summary: Implicitly converts value to an .

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_True(HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns true if value is not zero.
member.returns: Boolean to indicate whether the value was not equal to zero.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_False(HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns true if value is equal to zero.
member.returns: Boolean to indicate whether the value was equal to zero.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_OnesComplement(HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns bitwise complement of value.
member.returns: as result.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_BitwiseAnd(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise AND of values.
member.returns: Int24 as result of operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_BitwiseAnd(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise AND of values.
member.returns: Integer as result of operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_BitwiseAnd(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise AND of values.
member.returns: Integer as result of operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_BitwiseOr(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise OR of values.
member.returns: Int24 as result of operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_BitwiseOr(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise OR of values.
member.returns: Integer as result of operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_BitwiseOr(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise OR of values.
member.returns: Integer as result of operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_ExclusiveOr(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise exclusive-OR of values.
member.returns: Integer value of the resulting exclusive-OR operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_ExclusiveOr(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise exclusive-OR of values.
member.returns: Integer value of the resulting exclusive-OR operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_ExclusiveOr(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns logical bitwise exclusive-OR of values.
member.returns: Integer value of the resulting exclusive-OR operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_RightShift(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns value after right shifts of first value by the number of bits specified by second value.
member.param: shifts indicates how many places to shift.
member.returns: An value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_LeftShift(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns value after left shifts of first value by the number of bits specified by second value.
member.param: shifts indicates how many places to shift.
member.returns: An value.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Modulus(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns computed remainder after dividing first value by the second.
member.returns: as remainder

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Modulus(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns computed remainder after dividing first value by the second.
member.returns: as remainder

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Modulus(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns computed remainder after dividing first value by the second.
member.returns: as remainder

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Addition(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns computed sum of values.
member.returns: Int24 result of addition.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Addition(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns computed sum of values.
member.returns: Integer result of addition.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Addition(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns computed sum of values.
member.returns: Integer result of addition.

member.summary: Returns computed difference of values.
member.returns: Int24 result of subtraction.

member.summary: Returns computed difference of values.
member.returns: Integer result of subtraction.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Subtraction(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns computed difference of values.
member.returns: Integer result of subtraction.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Increment(HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns incremented value.
member.returns: Int24 result of increment.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Decrement(HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns decremented value.
member.returns: Int24 result of decrement.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Multiply(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns computed product of values.
member.returns: as result

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Multiply(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns computed product of values.
member.returns: as result

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Multiply(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns computed product of values.
member.returns: as result

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Division(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns computed division of values.
member.returns: Int24 result of operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Division(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns computed division of values.
member.returns: Integer result of operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Division(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns computed division of values.
member.returns: Integer result of operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Exponent(HexTools.Int24,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns result of first value raised to power of second value.
member.returns: Double that is the result of the operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Exponent(System.Int32,HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns result of first value raised to power of second value.
member.returns: Double that is the result of the operation.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.op_Exponent(HexTools.Int24,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns result of first value raised to power of second value.
member.returns: Double that is the result of the operation.

member.name: F:HexTools.Int24.MaxValue
member.summary: Represents the largest possible value of an Int24. This field is constant.

member.name: F:HexTools.Int24.MinValue
member.summary: Represents the smallest possible value of an Int24. This field is constant.

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.GetBytes(HexTools.Int24)
member.summary: Returns the specified Int24 value as an array of three bytes.
member.param: Int24 value to convert to bytes.
member.returns: An array of bytes with length 3.

remarks.para: You can use this function in-lieu of a System.BitConverter.GetBytes(Int24) function.
Bytes will be returned in endian order of currently executing process architecture (little-endian on Intel platforms).

member.name: M:HexTools.Int24.GetValue(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a 24-bit signed integer from three bytes at a specified position in a byte array.
member.returns: A 24-bit signed integer formed by three bytes beginning at startIndex.

remarks.para: You can use this function in-lieu of a System.BitConverter.ToInt24 function.
Bytes endian order assumed to match that of currently executing process architecture (little-endian on Intel platforms).

member.exception: cannot be null.
is greater than length.
length from is too small to represent an .

member.name: T:HexTools.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:HexTools.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:HexTools.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:HexTools.My.Resources.Resources.Edit
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:HexTools.My.Resources.Resources.Export
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:HexTools.My.Resources.Resources.Import
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:HexTools.My.Resources.Resources.MagnifyMinus
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:HexTools.My.Resources.Resources.MagnifyPlus
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:HexTools.My.Resources.Resources.Preview
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: T:HexTools.BitmapHandler
member.summary: Image loading toolset class which corrects the bug that prevents paletted PNG images with transparency from being loaded as paletted. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/dotnet/articles/aa479306(v=msdn.10)?redirectedfrom=MSDN http://www.libpng.org/pub/png/spec/1.2/PNG-Chunks.html

member.name: M:HexTools.BitmapHandler.WritePngChunk(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Writes a png data chunk.
member.param: Offset in the array to write the data to.
Data to write into the new chunk.
member.returns: The new offset after writing the new chunk. Always equal to the offset plus the length of chunk data plus 12.

member.name: M:HexTools.BitmapHandler.LoadBitmap(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Loads an image, checks if it is a PNG containing palette transparency, and if so, ensures it loads correctly. The theory on the png internals can be found at http://www.libpng.org/pub/png/book/chapter08.html
member.returns: The loaded image.

member.name: M:HexTools.BitmapHandler.FindChunk(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Finds the start of a png chunk. This assumes the image is already identified as PNG. It does not go over the first 8 bytes, but starts at the start of the header chunk.
member.param: The bytes of the png image.
The name of the chunk to find.
member.returns: The index of the start of the png chunk, or -1 if the chunk was not found.

member.name: M:HexTools.BitmapHandler.CloneImage(System.Drawing.Bitmap)
member.summary: Clones an image object to free it from any backing resources. Code taken from http://stackoverflow.com/a/3661892/ with some extra fixes.
member.returns: The cloned image.
